testcase.name: isPassedLetterTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "obvxvsibvq", 375101, 'A', 1, 5, 35.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [375101A (35.00 cr), "obvxvsibvq". Mandatory, period: 5.], 1, 2012 ) Calling new Course( "mawygdgais", 340389, 'A', 0, 5, 33.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [340389A (33.00 cr), "mawygdgais". Optional, period: 5.], 65, 2025 ) Calling setGrade( 'F' ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 'A' ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 'f' ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 'a' ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 'F' ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 5 ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 'A' ) Calling setGrade( 5 ) Calling isPassed( ) ✓

testcase.name: courseTests
testcase.system-out:
Calling new Course( "fllbdisjna", 695995, 'P', 1, 1, 52.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [695995P (52.00 cr), "fllbdisjna". Mandatory, period: 1.], 5, 2008 ) Calling new Course( "trrlipdvfd", 639270, 'A', 0, 2, 43.0, false ) Calling setCourse( [639270A (43.00 cr), "trrlipdvfd". Optional, period: 2.] ) Calling getCourse( ) Checking whether the two course objects are equal: => Course 2: Reading the value of private String name ~> "trrlipdvfd" => Course 1: Checking whether private String name is "trrlipdvfd" ~> "trrlipdvfd" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private String courseCode ~> "639270A" => Course 1: Checking whether the value of private String courseCode matches "639270A" ~> "639270A" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private Character courseBase ~> 'A' => Course 1: Checking whether private Character courseBase is 'A' ~> 'A' (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private int period ~> 2 => Course 1: Checking whether private int period is 2 ~> 2 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private double credits ~> 43.0 => Course 1: Checking whether private double credits is 43.0 ~> 43.0 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private boolean numericGrade ~> false => Course 1: Checking whether private boolean numericGrade is false ~> false (true) ✓ => The course objects are equal.
Reading the value of private Course course ~> [639270A (43.00 cr), "trrlipdvfd". Optional, period: 2.] Checking whether the two course objects are equal: => Course 2: Reading the value of private String name ~> "trrlipdvfd" => Course 1: Checking whether private String name is "trrlipdvfd" ~> "trrlipdvfd" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private String courseCode ~> "639270A" => Course 1: Checking whether the value of private String courseCode matches "639270A" ~> "639270A" (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private Character courseBase ~> 'A' => Course 1: Checking whether private Character courseBase is 'A' ~> 'A' (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private int period ~> 2 => Course 1: Checking whether private int period is 2 ~> 2 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private double credits ~> 43.0 => Course 1: Checking whether private double credits is 43.0 ~> 43.0 (true) ✓ => Course 2: Reading the value of private boolean numericGrade ~> false => Course 1: Checking whether private boolean numericGrade is false ~> false (true) ✓ => The course objects are equal.

testcase.name: gradeNumLetterTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "pacigvufwg", 253037, 'P', 0, 1, 14.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [253037P (14.00 cr), "pacigvufwg". Optional, period: 1.], 3, 2020 ) Calling new Course( "krxplpksgi", 313791, 'A', 0, 2, 34.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [313791A (34.00 cr), "krxplpksgi". Optional, period: 2.], 0, 0 ) Calling setGrade( 70 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is 70 ~> 70 (true) Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 70 ✓ Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2026 ✓ Assigning value 65 to private int gradeNum Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 65 ~> 65 (true) Calling getGradeNum( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 0 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 0 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 1 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 1 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 2 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 2 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 3 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 3 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 4 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 4 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 5 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 5 ~> 65 (false) ✓ Checking whether private int gradeNum is 65 ~> 65 (true) Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 65 ✓

testcase.name: yearCompletedTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "nntzqezydg", 63886, 'P', 1, 5, 23.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [63886P (23.00 cr), "nntzqezydg". Mandatory, period: 5.], 4, 2006 ) Calling new Course( "duhsfqtabk", 104122, 'P', 0, 2, 49.0, false ) Creating new StudentCourse( [104122P (49.00 cr), "duhsfqtabk". Optional, period: 2.], 1917, 52 ) (letter graded) Calling new StudentCourse( [104122P (49.00 cr), "duhsfqtabk". Optional, period: 2.], 52, 1917 ) Calling setGrade( 'A' ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2026 ~> 2026 (true) Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2026 ✓ Checking whether getYear( ) returns 2026 ~> 2026 (true) Calling getYear( ) ✓ Calling setYear( 2001 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2001 ~> 2001 (true) Calling setYear( 2026 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2026 ~> 2026 (true) Calling setYear( 2000 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is within ]2000, 2026] ~> 2026 (true) Calling setYear( 2027 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is within ]2000, 2026] ~> 2026 (true) Calling setYear( 2018 ) Checking whether getYear( ) returns 2018 ~> 2018 (true) Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2018 ✓ Calling setYear( -1 ) Checking whether private int yearCompleted is 2018 ~> 2018 (true) Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2018 ✓

testcase.name: toStringTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "vhvjtujjeg", 956510, 'P', 1, 4, 18.0, false ) Calling new StudentCourse( [956510P (18.00 cr), "vhvjtujjeg". Mandatory, period: 4.], 70, 2021 ) Calling new Course( "gkkmsjdzbw", 470940, 'A', 0, 1, 40.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [470940A (40.00 cr), "gkkmsjdzbw". Optional, period: 1.], 0, 2010 ) Calling toString( ) The output should match the regular expression pattern: "\[?\[470940A \( 40\.?00 cr\), "gkkmsjdzbw"\.? Optional, period: 1\.?\] Year: 2010, Grade: "?Not graded"?\.?\] " Attempting to locate the starting point of the regular expression pattern: "\[?\[4709" ✓ ✓ Calling new Course( "tedskdppbc", 167356, 'A', 0, 2, 29.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [167356A (29.00 cr), "tedskdppbc". testcase.name: gradeNumNumericTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Course( "wrwpxtbmbl", 459555, 'P', 0, 4, 18.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [459555P (18.00 cr), "wrwpxtbmbl". Optional, period: 4.], 1, 2005 ) Calling new Course( "lwcsqygvip", 279339, 'P', 0, 2, 13.0, true ) Calling new StudentCourse( [279339P (13.00 cr), "lwcsqygvip". Optional, period: 2.], -1, -1 ) Calling setGrade( 0 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is 0 ~> 0 (true) Calling setGrade( 5 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is 5 ~> 5 (true) Calling setGrade( -1 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is within [0, 5] ~> 5 (true) Calling setGrade( 6 ) Checking whether private int gradeNum is within [0, 5] ~> 5 (true) Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 5 ✓ Reading the value of private int yearCompleted ~> 2026 ✓ Assigning value 1 to private int gradeNum Calling getGradeNum( ) ✓ Calling setGrade( 3 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 3 ~> 3 (true) ✓ Calling setGrade( 65 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 65 ~> 3 (false) ✓ Calling setGrade( 70 ) Checking whether getGradeNum( ) returns 70 ~> 3 (false) ✓ Reading the value of private int gradeNum ~> 3 ✓
